message:
feat(dashboard): Add conflicts panel and rotation status indicators

Extends the dashboard with file conflict visibility and context rotation
status indicators to help operators monitor multi-agent coordination.

Dashboard changes (dashboard.go):

1. FileConflictMsg message type (line 171-173)
   - Carries watcher.FileConflict to dashboard
   - Enables real-time conflict notification flow

2. Model extended (line 362, 419-423)
   - conflictsPanel *panels.ConflictsPanel field
   - PaneStatus.IsRotating for in-progress rotation
   - PaneStatus.RotatedAt for recent rotation tracking

3. Update() handles conflicts (line 1464-1479)
   - FileConflictMsg: Routes to conflictsPanel.AddConflict()
   - ConflictActionResultMsg: Handles action completion
   - Removes conflicts on successful resolution

4. Pane grid rotation indicators (line 2971-2992)
   - Animated 🔄 spinner during rotation (Shimmer effect)
   - "↻ rotated Xm ago" for recently rotated agents (< 5min)
   - Style: Blue bold for active, overlay italic for recent

5. Token display formatting (line 2728-2745)
   - formatTokenDisplay(): "142.5K / 200K" format
   - formatDuration(): Compact "2m", "45s", "1h" format
   - Extended view shows token counts above context bar

Conflicts panel (panels/conflicts.go - new):

1. ConflictsPanel struct
   - Active conflicts list with FIFO management
   - Max 10 concurrent conflicts displayed
   - Keyed removal by path+requestor

2. Rendering
   - File path, requestor, holders
   - Time remaining on reservation
   - Action buttons (wait, force-release)

3. ConflictActionResultMsg for action feedback

Test coverage:
- context_test.go: Context bar rendering, token formatting
- conflicts_test.go: Panel add/remove, rendering, actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
